name: lenient
description: Lenient critic profile. Critic acts as a fast second opinion on proposed changes; minor findings can be auto-resolved if author addresses them in the same turn. Use during active execution sessions with full supervision.
notes: Lenient profile for active sessions. Auto-resolution permitted because the user is present to review the resolution. Escalation list is the minimum non-negotiable set — invariant violations and out-of-scope changes always escalate, test deletion always escalates because it reduces verification surface.
